propositions: Rewrite docs/identity.md and ADR 0045 to match the approved authenticated-identity design after TS1/TS2/TS3 land the implementation.
Document authorship as an in-toto Statement whose subject binds event_uuid and content_hash via DSSE payloadType application/vnd.rebar.authorship.v1+json.

Document key validity via git-commit-ancestry: an event is valid iff its introducing commit descends added_at_commit and not revoked_at_commit, with rationale for why the immutable DAG beats wall-clock/HLC ordering.
Document the approved snapshot ledger schema with nested position {commit_sha, position} so compacted events re-verify from the ledger alone.
Document the verify-authorship verdict enum (verified/unsigned/unknown-author/bad-signature/key_not_valid_at_era) and its display grouping, distinct from the unchanged verify-signature HMAC schema.
Remove all HLC-epoch, raw-bytes, and old {author_id,author_sig,epoch} ledger language while keeping the docs-index completeness gate passing.
